titleStmt.title: Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 2

div.p: William by the grace of God King of Scots, to bishops, abbots, earls, barons, justices, sheriffs, officials, and all worthy men of the whole of his land, clerk and lay [-and] Greeting: Let present and future know that I have granted, and by this my charter made firm to God, and to the Church of Saint Andrew the Apostle, and to the Canons there serving God, and who shall serve there in perpetuity, the land at 'Hebrecces' that Walter son of Philip has given, granted and made firm in perpetuity to them, with common pasture, to be held perpetually as freely and quietly from every service and custom and exaction as the brethren of the Hospital of the Temple ever hold, and just as the charter of the aforesaid Walter son of Philip bears witness and makes firm. As witnesses: Richard Bishop of Dunkeld, Walter de Bidun the Chancellor, Earl Duncan, Richard de Morville the Constable, Walter of Windsor, Geoffrey de Malville. At Kinghorn.
